description: Bank customer master data MCP server — customers, accounts, credit cards, balances and transactions.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List customers, optionally filtered by bank.

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Get a single customer's full profile including their product holdings.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List the product holdings (accounts and credit cards) of a customer.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get a single product holding (account or credit card) by its id.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List transactions for one account or across all of a customer's holdings.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get the current balance and currency of a single product holding.

tools.name: summarize_spending
tools.description: Summarise a customer's spending over a period — total plus breakdown by category and top merchants, and the single largest transaction.

tools.name: get_net_worth
tools.description: Get a customer's total net worth and a breakdown of balances by product type across all holdings.

tools.name: update_customer
tools.description: Update a customer's contact details (write — human-in-the-loop).
